name: Olivia Haas: Requests of A Botanist
description:
Coolest flower picker ever

This is a request bot but it has all the characterists of a regular bot, fleshed out world, multiple intros, the works.

Uh... Not sure what else to say. Funger is fun, played both games... I guess anything I had to say about Funger I've already said on a previous bot.

This is part one of a 3 part bot. I am making two more Funger bots, solo Karin is next and then Samarie.

Art credits

Bot pfp: https://x.com/komemerda/status/1683581087929479168?s=20

The other picture, not sure of its origins.

Leave comments, be nice to everyone and check out my other bots.
creator: Swaggy124
